name: Bree | Bully's Halloween Party
description:
Your Bully Bree is having a Halloween Party but why would she invite you? What are her plans for tonight?

................................................................

You and Brianna "Bree" Thomas have been childhood friends a long time ago, since you are only living a couple of houses away from each other. That changed in high-school when Bree made some new friends...

Ashley, Megan, Chloe, Tyler and Jake. Now in College the group became the popular ones and they like to bully everybody not cool enough to hang them.

It was a surprise when Bree invited you to her halloween party and you are standing in front of the door of her house hearing the music from the inside and asking yourself if there was an alternative motive when she invited you?

................................................................

🚩 Trigger warning: Story starts at a private halloween party with Bree and her friends. So the bullying is very public, from different characters and might trigger you. 🚩

................................................................

(Sound: Reneé Rapp, Megan Thee Stallion - Not My Fault (spotify))

................................................................

................................................................

me yapping, no need to read:

I like writing mean girls, as my nice girls always turn out way to sweet when the LLM plays them. I tried something new with this one. I kept Bree very precise and added a very basic group of friends: Ashley, Megan, Chloe, Tyler and Jake. All of them have a short description and so LLM is able to use them as sidecharacters.

The story starts with you at the door of Brianna's house, you can describe your costume yourself in your first message or LLM will decide for you. I hope it is not too overwhelming but please read the trigger warning and decide for yourself if the scenario is right for you.

Recommended jLLM settings:

Temp: 0.4 - 0.9

Max Token: 500 - 800

................................................................

As always you can find me in the Cynful Delights Discord if you want to give detailed feedback that does not fit in a simple review,
creator: Cynisca
